tasks.title: Bot skeleton: grammY config, SQLite schema (users/services/slots/appointments/schedule_days/reminded_at), update router, per-chat FSM, /start registration, /help, fallbacks, seed the 3 services (details.md §1, §5, §9)
Admin weekly schedule panel /admin_schedule: weekday → open/close times + working-day toggle, regenerate future free slots (details.md §6, §7)
Client booking flow /book: service → day → slot → race-safe confirm in one transaction, slot reappears on failure (details.md §2)
Appointment management: /my list with cancel buttons, /cancel confirm dialog + slot reactivation (details.md §3, §4)
Daily 10:00 ReminderScheduler tick: per-appointment DM with idempotent reminded_at stamp so a restart cannot double-send (details.md §8)
Wire all flows end-to-end, timezone/restart safety pass, error fallbacks everywhere, admin gate on /admin_schedule (details.md §9, design.md §5)
